description: This file defines and exports lazily-initialized Zod schemas for document-related request DTOs, specifically 'DocumentCreateRequest' and 'ExtractedTextUpsertRequest'. It manages schema initialization asynchronously, provides proxy objects for synchronous schema validation, and maintains compatibility with route handlers expecting synchronous `.safeParse()` methods.

methods.name: _initSchemas
methods.description: Asynchronously initializes Zod schemas for document creation and text extraction requests.

methods.name: _createLazySchemaProxy
methods.description: Creates a proxy object exposing a synchronous-like `.safeParse()` method for a specified schema key, handling lazy initialization.

methods.name: getDocumentSchemas
methods.description: Public async function that returns a promise resolving to the schemas, initializing them lazily if needed.
